Operation 'savePage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about inputs (SavePageRequest structure), outputs (SavePageResponse details), and side effects (archive availability). Enhanced version clarifies what gets archived, what parameters are needed, what is returned, and the resulting state change for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Archive a web page and save it in the specified format
data.summary_suggestion: Archive web page with specified format
data.description_suggestion: Archives a complete web page including all assets and saves it in the specified format for permanent storage. Accepts a URL and format preference via SavePageRequest. Returns a SavePageResponse containing the archive ID, URL, format, creation timestamp, and access details. The archived page becomes immediately retrievable via the archives endpoint.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs (SavePageRequest structure), outputs (SavePageResponse details), and side effects (archive availability). Enhanced version clarifies what gets archived, what parameters are needed, what is returned, and the resulting state change for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'listArchives' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too generic. Enhanced version specifies that results are paginated, mentions parameter support for filtering/sorting, clarifies authentication scope, and details the ArchiveList response structure to help AI agents understand filtering capabilities and result structure.

data.current_description: Get a list of saved archives
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all saved archives for the authenticated user. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an ArchiveList object containing archive metadata including IDs, URLs, formats, creation dates, and pagination information for efficient browsing of large archive collections.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Enhanced version specifies that results are paginated, mentions parameter support for filtering/sorting, clarifies authentication scope, and details the ArchiveList response structure to help AI agents understand filtering capabilities and result structure.

message: Operation 'getArchive' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what details are returned (metadata fields) and clarify the path parameter requirement for better AI agent understanding of response structure and parameter usage.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific archive
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete details of a specific archive by its ID. Returns archive metadata including the original URL, saved format, creation timestamp, file size, and access URL for retrieving the archived content. Requires the archive ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what details are returned (metadata fields) and clarify the path parameter requirement for better AI agent understanding of response structure and parameter usage.

message: Operation 'deleteArchive' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical information about permanence, side effects, and response details. Enhanced version emphasizes irreversibility, clarifies what gets deleted, specifies the path parameter, and explains the resulting state change to help AI agents understand the destructive nature and consequences of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a saved archive by its ID. Removes all associated files and metadata from storage. This action is irreversible. Requires the archive ID as a path parameter. Returns a success confirmation or error response. The archive becomes inaccessible immediately after deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical information about permanence, side effects, and response details. Enhanced version emphasizes irreversibility, clarifies what gets deleted, specifies the path parameter, and explains the resulting state change to help AI agents understand the destructive nature and consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Take a screenshot of a web page
data.description_suggestion: Captures a screenshot of a specified web page and saves it as an image file. Accepts URL and optional rendering parameters via request body. Returns image data or a reference URL depending on response format. The screenshot is generated on-demand and may be stored for retrieval. Supports various image formats and viewport configurations.
